titleStmt.title: SII 23.185: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 185. (A.R. No. 185 of 1907.) Uṟaiyūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Pañchavarṇēśvara temple—on the west wall of the central shrine

summary.p: This consists of a number of disconnected pieces of an inscription. A few words of the historical introduction of the Chōḷa king Rājēndradēva are traceable in one of them which is dated in the 3+1st year of the king, expressed definitely as the 319th day of the year. The inscription registers the grant of a tax-free land measuring 29 vēli and odd in extent, in two villages under the name Atiguṇakaṟpakanallūr, for the expenses of worship in the temple of Mahādēva at Uṟaiyūr in Uṟaiyūr-kūṟṟam a subdivision of Keraḷāntaka-vaḷanāḍu. The pieces give elaborate details of the requirements of daily worship and of those on special festival days of the year like the Uttaram-ayana-Saṅkrānti, Kārttigai lights etc. Mention is made of a certain Aṇukkiyār Appi Madurāntakiyār under whose instruction the inscription is said to have been engraved. Reference is made to a temple of Villīśvara among the boundaries of the land granted.
Subsidiary deities to whom separate offerings were made daily were Chandraśēkhara, Gaṇapati, Lōkaviṭaṅka and Uṟandai-Nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ceṅkol ven
mūṉṟāvatu keraḷāntakavaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūrkkūṟṟa
ttu Uṟaiyūr brahmadeya lattil
kaṭaiya nilaṅkalan
ṭe Orumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇikkiḻ muṉṟu māmukkāṇi Arai

virintu Aḷantapaṭi nilam patiṉmuṉṟe mukkā kkum
raikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ Aṟumākkāṇi kiḻmukkāle muṉṟu mā
m Ūrnattam Uḷḷiṭṭu nilam Araiye ṇi
kaikkiḻ Eḻumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ ki
lam paṉṉiraṇṭe Orumāmukkāṇi Araikkāṇikkiḻ
raikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ Araiyum puncey nilam Onṟe mā
kkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ kāleyaraikkāṇikkiḻ nāṉkumāvum kani
kki nilam patiṉmuṉṟe muṉṟumā muntirikaikkiḻ mukkāle nāṉku mā
kkiḻarai nellu
lam Innāṭṭu Uṟaiyūr mahādevarkku veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvati
ṉ Etirāmāṇṭumutal Iṟuppatāka Innilam Atikuṇakaṟpakanallūr renṟu n=tirunāmattā
l tevartānam Iṟaiyiliyāka yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟoru pattonpatinā
l variyiliṭṭatu Ivvūr Atikuṇakaṟpakanallūr nilam kiḻpāṟkellai Uṟaiyūr
brahmadeyattu nilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai Uṟaiyūr vaṭakkil li
kku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai rājāśrayac caruppetimaṅkalattu nilattukku kiḻakkum va
ṭapāṟkellai koṭuṅkālukku teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellai yuḷ

nellu nāḻiyum nāḷoṉṟukku tirumeyppūccukku cantaṉam Oru palat tukku nellu Aiññāḻiyum nāḷoṉṟiṉukku citāri Araippalattukku nellu Aiññāḻiyum
Irutūṇi mukkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiāka Āṇṭuvarai veṇṭum nellu Āyirattu Aṟupattaiṅkalamum Uttaramayaṉa caṅkirāntippaṭi kalaicamāṭi Amutuceytaruḷa Uḷḷiṭṭu nellu Aiṅka
lamum kārttikaik kārttikait tirunāḷ tiruviḷakkiṉukkuḷḷiṭṭu nellup patiṉkalamum putiyitu
kkum Āṇṭuvarai nellu Āyirattu nāṉūṟṟirupattiru kalane tūṇip patakkum Uṭaiyārkku tiruvārātaṉai
kku veṇṭu nellu nāṉāḻiyāka nāḷ Onṟiṉukku nellu kuṟuṇiyum tiruppaḷḷittāmam toṭuppān Oruvaṉukku nāḷ Oṉṟiṉu
rāl nellu nāṉāḻiyāka nāḷ Oṉṟiṉukku nelluk kuṟuṇiyum tirunantavaṉakkuṭikaḷ Iruvarkku perā

ṭuvāṉ Oruvaṉukku nāḷ Oṉṟiṉukku nelluk kuṟuṇiyum kiḻāḷ Eḻi ṉukku perāl nellu Aṟu nāḻiyāka nāḷ Oṉṟiṉukku nellu
kku nelluk kuṟuṇiyum vaṇṇattāṉ Oruvaṉukku nāḷ Oṉṟiṉukku nellu nāṉāḻiyum
takku ..ittevar tevatāṉam muṉ cuṭṭappaṭṭa Atikuṇakaṟppakanallūr Uṭaiyār śrī
vittār Ittevar Aṇukkiyār Appiy maturāntakiyār Ivar coṟpaṭi kaṇkāṇiyāy niṉṟu Ikkal veṭṭuvittān Ivarka

kiḻnālumāvum Āka nilam patiṉmuṉ—
nālmāvaraikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ A—
kiḻmukkāle muṉṟumāvil natta—
niṅku nilam Araiye muṉṟumākkāṇi—
ḻumāvaraikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ nāluma—
nikki nirnilam paṉṉiraṇṭe Orumāmukkāṇi—
kkāṇikkiḻ muṉṟumāmukkāṇi Araikkāṇi munti—
mpuṉcey nilam Oṉṟe nālumā Araikkāṇi—
ḻaraiye mukkāle Araikkāṇikkiḻ nālumāvu—
lnikkinilam patiṉmuṉṟe Āṟumāmuntirikaikkiḻ mukkāle nālumā muntirikaik—
ḻaraiye nālumāviṉāl kāṇikkaṭa nellu Āyirakkalamum Ittevar tevatāṉaṅ—
pakarattukkaḷ kiḻpāṟkellai villisvarattukkum kamukaṅkālukkum karuppaṅ kālukkum—

mekkum teṉpāṟkellai Atikuṇakaṟpakanallūrkku vaṭakkum mipāṟ kellai
rājāśrayac caruppetimaṅkalattu nilattukkum kāmaṉkāl nilattukkum
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai pūtamaṅkalattu Ellaikkut teṟkum Āka Iv vicait
taperunāṉkellaiyuṭ kāmaṉkālttiṭal ṉikki Ūrnattamum Oṭaiyum tiṭaluṅ
kiṇaṟumuḷppaṭa nilam patiṉ Āṟekāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ Eṭṭumāviṉāl kāṇikkaṭa
ṉ nellu Āyirattaiññūṟṟaṟupattirukalaṉe tūṇippatakku Āka Ūr Iraṇṭinā
l nilaṉ Irupattoṉpate Āṟumākkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻarai nālumā—
viṉāl kāṇikkaṭaṉ nellu Iraṇṭāyirattaiññūṟṟaṟupattirukalaṉe tūṇippatakku
Innellukku nivantañ ceytapaṭi Uṭaiyārkku ciṟukālaisantikkumn tirup
poṉakattukku poṉakappaḻaarici Irunāḻiyum paruppamitu Iru nāḻi
ppaṭi santikku poṉakappaḻaarici nāṉāḻiyum Uccampotai santikku po
ṉakappaḻaarici kuṟuṇiyum Iravai santikku poṉakappaḻaarici kuṟuṇiyum Atta
yāmattukku poṉakappaḻaarici nāṉāḻiyum cantiracekaratevarkku ciṟu kālaiccantik
ku poṉakappaḻaarici Irunāḻiyum gaṇapatiyārkku Uccampotaic cantik kup poṉakappa
ḻa Arici Iru nāḻiyum Ōlokaviṭaṅkatevarkku meṟpaṭi santikku poṉa kappaḻaarici nāṉā
ḻiyum Ittevar nampirāṭṭiyārkku meṟpaṭi santikku poṉakappaḻa Arici Iru nāḻiyum Uṟantai
nācakarkku meṟpaṭi santikku poṉakappaḻaarici nāṉāḻiyum It tevar nampirāṭṭiyārkku meṟ
paṭi santikku poṉakappaḻaarici Iru nāḻiyum Aṉṉapalikku santi Iraṇ ṭiṉukku Arici
nāḻiyum caṭṭiccoṟṟukku caṭṭi Aiñciṉukku Arici kuṟuṇiirunāḻi yum Āka nāḷoṉ
ṟiṉukku Arici tūṇippatakku Aiññāḻikku Aiñciraṇṭuvaṇṇaṅ kuṟuka liṭṭapaṭi ve
ṇṭum nellukku ney tūṇi nāṉāḻi Uriyum Uṭaiyārkku mantira poṉakattu nāḷ
o paruppamutu Irunāḻikku veṇṭum payaṟu muṉṉāḻikku nellu Aṟunā
ḻiyu tukku nāḷoṉṟiṉukku paruppamutu Urikku payaṟu muḻakkiṉukku nellu nāḻi
Uriyum Amutu ceytaruḷa nāḷoṉṟiṉukku caṟkarai Amutu Oru palat tukku nellu nāḻiyum
nāḷoṉṟiṉukku kaṟiyamutu Iraṇṭiṉukku nellu kuṟuṇiyum nāḷoṉ ṟiṉukku Uppa
mutu Urikku nellu nāḻiyum nāḷoṉṟiṉukku neyyamutu Urikku nellu patakkum nāḷoThere are two more pieces which are too fragmentary for any sense.
Digital edition of SII 23.185 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
